calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-10-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-10-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause was re-assigned by the PJ. for Default Prove-up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura/S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Saul M. Ferster, Esq. for Plaintiff: O.A. Talmage Co., A California Corporation. Plaintiff's witness: William Talmage, present, was sworn and examined.
No appearance by Defendant: Duram Ruiz, sued as Duram Ruiz-Chanchold, and default was entered on 3/8/06 for Co-Defendant: Belinda Ruiz.
Plaintiff is entitled to a judgment against the defendant for restitution and possession of the premises of the property located at: 849 Divisadero Street #6, San Francisco, CA.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Duram Ruiz, sued as Duram Ruiz-Chanchold, and Belinda Ruiz as follows:
Forfeiture of Lease
Past Due rents and damages of $4,236.36
Costs of $422.50
for a total of $4,658.86
Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT DURAN RUIZ
